TestBinaryMaskOperations - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.unit
Unit tests for LDC plugin binary mask operations, including : Erosion. Dilatation. Opening. Closing. Watershed.

TestPipeline - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.unit
Integration tests, for the entire pipeline workflow with different scenarios, including .csv results check.
TestPipeline() - Constructor for class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.unit.TestPipeline
 
TestPlugin - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests
Simply creates a new ImageJ interface, containing as well the plugin content (from src/main/java).
Entry point for development, instantly opens the MainGUI_LDC.
TestPlugin() - Constructor for class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.TestPlugin
 
TestPreprocessing - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.unit
Unit tests for LDC plugin preprocessing treatments, including : Contrast enhancement (preview). Median filter application.

TestSegmentation - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.unit
Unit tests for LDC plugin segmentation/threshold treatments, including : Manual method. Otsu method. Moments method. Triangle method. Yen method. Li method. Dark background option.
TestSegmentation() - Constructor for class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.unit.TestSegmentation

LeftPanel's thresholding operations manager
ThresholdingManager - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.leftpanel
Provides segmentation and thresholding operations on ImagePlus objects.

The panel handling the Segmentation / Thresholding step.
ThresholdingPanel(Context, LeftPanel) - Constructor for class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Constructs the ThresholdingPanel, initializing all UI components and wiring their listeners to the corresponding logic methods.

toggleArea() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Toggles area measurements based on the checkbox state.
toggleCircularity() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Toggles circularity measurements based on the checkbox state.
toggleContrast() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Toggles contrast enhancement based on the checkbox state.
toggleDefaultCalibration() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Toggle default calibration measurements based on the checkbox state.
toggleDiameter() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Toggles diameter measurements based on the checkbox state.
toggleExcludeOnEdges() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Toggles whether droplets touching the edges of the current image are excluded from analysis, based on the checkbox state.
toggleIncludeHoles() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Toggles the include holes option, based on the checkbox state.
toggleIntegratedDensity() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Toggles integrated density measurements based on the checkbox state.
toggleIsCalibrated() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Toggles the manual calibration field and updates the LDCService state.
toggleMean() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Toggles mean measurements based on the checkbox state.
toggleMedian() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Toggles median measurements based on the checkbox state.
toggleMedian() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Toggles the median filter controls.
toggleNoMax() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Enables or disables the 'Max' input for particle size.
triggerPreview() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.MorphologyPanel
Triggers or resets the morphological preview on the binary mask, depending on the current state of the preview checkbox.
